<h1>Source code for booktx.rendering</h1><div class="highlight"><pre>
<span></span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Rich/text/JSON output renderers.</span>

<span class="sd">Moved out of :mod:`booktx.cli` so command functions contain only option</span>
<span class="sd">parsing + service call + renderer call. Each renderer owns the exact console</span>
<span class="sd">output and can be unit-tested without Typer.</span>

<span class="sd">The module creates its own :class:`rich.console.Console` so it never depends</span>
<span class="sd">on the CLI module (which would create a circular import).</span>
<span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">__future__</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">annotations</span>

<span class="kn">import</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">json</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">typing</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">TYPE_CHECKING</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Any</span>

<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">rich.console</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">Console</span>

<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.config</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">resolve_stored_path</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.path_display</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">display_path</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.tasks</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">TaskPathDisplay</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">task_paths</span>

<span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">TYPE_CHECKING</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.config</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">Project</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.models</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">TranslationTask</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.runtime</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">RuntimeMode</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.status</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">ChapterProgress</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">StatusBundle</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.validate</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">Finding</span>

<span class="n">__all__</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;console&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;format_chunk_span&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;print_status_human&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;print_translate_task&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">&quot;render_submission_failures&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">]</span>

<span class="n">console</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Console</span><span class="p">()</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="format_chunk_span">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.rendering.format_chunk_span">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">format_chunk_span</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chunk_ids</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return a compact chunk-id range string for human display.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">chunk_ids</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="s2">&quot;-&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chunk_ids</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">chunk_ids</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">chunk_ids</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">..</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">chunk_ids</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="print_status_human">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.rendering.print_status_human">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">print_status_human</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">bundle</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">StatusBundle</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chapter</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">ChapterProgress</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Render the human-readable ``booktx status`` summary to the console.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">snapshot</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">bundle</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">snapshot</span>
    <span class="n">totals</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">snapshot</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">totals</span>
    <span class="n">source</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">snapshot</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span>
    <span class="n">ctx</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">snapshot</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;booktx status — </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">snapshot</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Source: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">filename</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Source language: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_language</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Target language: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_language</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Context: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="s1">&#39;READY&#39;</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">if</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">ctx</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ready</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">else</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s1">&#39;NOT READY&#39;</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">source</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_drifted</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;[yellow]WARNING: source file changed since last extraction.[/yellow]&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;  Run &#39;booktx extract&#39; to update chunks before translating.&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Total source words: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">totals</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_words</span><span class="si">:</span><span class="s2">&gt;10,</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Translated words:   </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">totals</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">translated_words</span><span class="si">:</span><span class="s2">&gt;10,</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Remaining words:    </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">totals</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">remaining_words</span><span class="si">:</span><span class="s2">&gt;10,</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Chunks:   </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">totals</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunks_complete</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> / </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">totals</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunks_total</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> complete, &quot;</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">totals</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunks_partial</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> partial, </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">totals</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunks_pending</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> pending&quot;</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Chapters: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">totals</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapters_complete</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> / &quot;</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">totals</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapters_total</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> complete, &quot;</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">totals</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapters_partial</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> partial, </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">totals</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapters_pending</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> pending&quot;</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">totals</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">invalid_translation_files</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">totals</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">stale_translation_files</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Translation files: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">totals</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">invalid_translation_files</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> invalid, &quot;</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">totals</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">stale_translation_files</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> stale&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">ready_for_final</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">totals</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records_remaining</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="mi">0</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">totals</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">invalid_translation_files</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Ready for final build: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="s1">&#39;yes&#39;</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">if</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">ready_for_final</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">else</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s1">&#39;no&#39;</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">ready_for_final</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">totals</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">remaining_words</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Reason: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">totals</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">remaining_words</span><span class="si">:</span><span class="s2">,</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> source words remain untranslated&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">totals</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">invalid_translation_files</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;Reason: &quot;</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">totals</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">invalid_translation_files</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> translation file(s) &quot;</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;are invalid&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">detail</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">chapter</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">snapshot</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">next</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">detail</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;Next chapter:&quot;</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">chapter</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="s2">&quot;Chapter:&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;  </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">detail</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">  </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">detail</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">rstrip</span><span class="p">())</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;  status: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">detail</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">status</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;  records: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">detail</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records_translated</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> / &quot;</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">detail</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records_total</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> translated, &quot;</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">detail</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records_remaining</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> remaining&quot;</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;  words: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">detail</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_words_translated</span><span class="si">:</span><span class="s2">,</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> / &quot;</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">detail</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_words_total</span><span class="si">:</span><span class="s2">,</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> translated, &quot;</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">detail</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_words_remaining</span><span class="si">:</span><span class="s2">,</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> remaining&quot;</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;  chunks: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">format_chunk_span</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">detail</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_ids</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;  pending chunks: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">format_chunk_span</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">detail</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">pending_chunk_ids</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;  record range: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">detail</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">record_range</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">..</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">detail</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">record_range</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">end</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>



<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_print_task_header</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">task</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationTask</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">context_display_path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Print shared task metadata header.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;task: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">task_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">todo_id</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;todo: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">todo_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;chapter: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">  </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_title</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">rstrip</span><span class="p">())</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;unit: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">unit</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;records: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">record_count</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">record_chunks</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">sorted</span><span class="p">({</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">})</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;record chunks: &quot;</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="s2">&quot;, &quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record_chunks</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;source words: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_words</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">translation_version</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;translation version: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">translation_version</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">baseline_ref</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;baseline: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">baseline_ref</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">baseline_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;baseline sha256: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">baseline_sha256</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_view_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;context view: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_view_sha256</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_notes_scope</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_notes_through_chapter_id</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;context notes: &quot;</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_notes_scope</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="ow">or</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s1">&#39;n/a&#39;</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">, through &quot;</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_notes_through_chapter_id</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="ow">or</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s1">&#39;none&#39;</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">context_display_path</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;context file: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">context_display_path</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_render_json_output</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">payload</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Render task as JSON.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print_json</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">json</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">dumps</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">payload</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ensure_ascii</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">))</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_render_tsv_output</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">task</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationTask</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">display</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TaskPathDisplay</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">json_submit</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Render task as TSV.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;# task: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">task_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;# chapter: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="se">\t</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_title</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">rstrip</span><span class="p">())</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="se">\t</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;# write translation JSON to: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">display</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ingest_json</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;# submit: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">json_submit</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_render_block_output</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">task</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationTask</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">display</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TaskPathDisplay</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">block_submit</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">view_sources</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">block_stdin</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">context_display_path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">show_template</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">show_sources</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Render task in block (durable agent workflow) format.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">_print_task_header</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">context_display_path</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Source file: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">display</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_block</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">soft_wrap</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">markup</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Durable block template: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">display</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ingest_block</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">soft_wrap</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">markup</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Submit durable file with: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">block_submit</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">soft_wrap</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">markup</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;View sources: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">view_sources</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">soft_wrap</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">markup</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;Submit only the template you filled. The JSON template targets &quot;</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;are intentionally empty unless you choose JSON mode.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">soft_wrap</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">markup</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">show_template</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;Heredoc template (optional, for tiny manual fixes):&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">block_stdin</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">soft_wrap</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">markup</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;&gt;&gt;&gt; </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;&lt;target&gt;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">idx</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;BOOKTX&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">show_sources</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;Sources:&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;&gt;&gt;&gt; </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">idx</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">()</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_render_default_output</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">task</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationTask</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">display</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TaskPathDisplay</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">json_submit</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">context_display_path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Render task in default human-readable format.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">_print_task_header</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">context_display_path</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">idx</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;Write translation JSON to:&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">display</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ingest_json</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;Submit with:&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">json_submit</span><span class="p">)</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="print_translate_task">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.rendering.print_translate_task">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">print_translate_task</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">task</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationTask</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">mode</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">RuntimeMode</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">as_json</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">output_format</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">show_sources</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">show_template</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Render a ``translate next`` / ``translate task`` result to the console.</span>

<span class="sd">    Supports four output modes: ``--json``, ``--format tsv``, ``--format block``</span>
<span class="sd">    (the durable agent workflow), and the default human-readable list.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">paths</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">task_paths</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">task_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">display</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">paths</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">display</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">mode</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.command_hints</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">translate_insert_command</span>

    <span class="n">json_submit</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">translate_insert_command</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">mode</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">task_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">task_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">file_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">display</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ingest_json</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">input_format</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;json&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">block_submit</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">translate_insert_command</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">mode</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">task_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">task_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">file_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">display</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ingest_block</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">input_format</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;block&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">block_stdin</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">paths</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">block_stdin_submit_hint</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">task_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">mode</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">view_sources</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;cat </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">display</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_block</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">context_view_display</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_view_path</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">raw_context_path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">resolve_stored_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_view_path</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">context_view_display</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">display_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">raw_context_path</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mode</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">mode</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
            <span class="k">else</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_view_path</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">context_display_path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">context_view_display</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;context.json&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;context.md&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">context_view_display</span>
        <span class="k">else</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">payload</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;version&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;task_id&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">task_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;unit&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">unit</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;chapter_id&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;chapter_title&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_title</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;source_language&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;target_language&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;translation_version&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">translation_version</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;baseline_ref&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">baseline_ref</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;baseline_sha256&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">baseline_sha256</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;context_sha256&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_sha256</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;context_view_sha256&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_view_sha256</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;context_view_path&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">context_view_display</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;context_notes_scope&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_notes_scope</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;context_target_chapter_id&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_target_chapter_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;context_notes_through_chapter_id&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_notes_through_chapter_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;source_sha256&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;source_words&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_words</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;record_count&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">record_count</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;record_chunks&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">sorted</span><span class="p">({</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">}),</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;requested_max_words&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">requested_max_words</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;todo_id&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">todo_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;records&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model_dump</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;json&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">],</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;ingest_path&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">display</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ingest_json</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;block_ingest_path&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">display</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ingest_block</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;source_block_path&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">display</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_block</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;submit_hint&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">json_submit</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;block_submit_hint&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">block_submit</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">}</span>

    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">as_json</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">_render_json_output</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">payload</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">output_format</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;tsv&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">_render_tsv_output</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">display</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">json_submit</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">output_format</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;block&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">_render_block_output</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">task</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">display</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">block_submit</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">view_sources</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">block_stdin</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">context_display_path</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">show_template</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">show_sources</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">_render_default_output</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">display</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">json_submit</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">context_display_path</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="render_submission_failures">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.rendering.render_submission_failures">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">render_submission_failures</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">findings</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Finding</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Render submission validation ERROR findings to the console.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;[red]error:[/red] submission rejected; no files changed&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">finding</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">findings</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">rule</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">:&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">rule</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">:&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;  </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">message</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;  source: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">soft_wrap</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">markup</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">console</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;  target: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">finding</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">soft_wrap</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">markup</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">)</span></div>

</pre></div>
